NWS STORM SURVEY FOUND A SMALL MICROBURST STRUCK ALONG PRIMEAUX ROAD SOUTHEAST OF MORSE. ONE HOUSE SUFFERED SHINGLE DAMAGE AND WAS SHIFTED BUT STAYED ON ITS BLOCKS. A GREENHOUSE AND SHED WERE ALSO DAMAGED WITH SHEET METAL BLOWN ACROSS ROAD. SEVERAL TREE LIMBS ALSO BLOWN DOWN. ESTIMATED WINDS OF 60 MPH.

NWS STORM SURVEY FOUND A 5 MILE LONG BY 1/2 MILE WIDE DOWNBURST STRUCK FROM 2 MILES SW TO 3 MILES E OF LEONVILLE. MINOR DAMAGE TO ROOFS AND SKIRTING OF MOBILE HOMES OCCURRED ALONG BAYOU TECHE SUBDV RD AND A BARN ROOF WAS BLOWN OFF. A ROOF WAS COMPLETELY BLOWN OFF A MOBILE HOME ON MARCEL ST. 2 LARGE PINE TREES HAD THEIR TRUNKS SNAPPED OFF AT THE HWY 31/741 INTERSECTION. MORE TREES WERE BLOWN DOWN WITH DAMAGE TO OUTBUILDINGS ON OLD SCHOOL RD. ESTIMATED WINDS OF 75-85 MPH.

EF0 TORNADO BEGAN NORTHEAST OF HWY 99 AND MARCEAUX RD INTERSECTION AND ENDED EAST OF HWY 382. SEVERAL FARM BUILDINGS WERE DAMAGED ALONG HWY 382 WITH SHEET METAL BLOWN ACROSS THE ROADWAY. PATH LENGTH 2 MILES AND PATH WIDTH 25 YARDS.

EF0 TORNADO BEGAN SOUTHWEST OF LYONS RD AND MOUTON RD INTERSECTION AND ENDED NORTHWEST OF HWY 26 AND BOBBY RD. SEVERAL POWER POLES WERE KNOCKED DOWN ALONG MOUTON RD AND LYONS RD. A MOBILE HOME LOST PART OF ITS ROOF ON BOBBY RD. PATH LENGTH 3 MILES AND PATH WIDTH 25 YARDS.

*** 3 INJ *** KATC REPORTS MODERATE BUILDING DAMAGE NEAR A WAFFLE HOUSE ALONG HWY 100 AND 13 JUST NORTH OF I-10. ADDITIONAL DAMAGE INCLUDES TWO RUPTURED GAS LINES. KATC ALSO REPORTS 3 MINOR INJURIES ASSOCIATED WITH THE STORM. POSSIBLE TORNADO

*** 3 INJ *** NWS STORM SURVEY CONFIRMS AN EF 0 TORNADO TOUCHDOWN. THE TORNADO WAS 25 YARDS WIDE AND PRODUCED A DAMAGE PATH TWO MILES LONG. 3 INJURIES WERE CONFIRMED IN ASSOCIATION WITH THIS TORNADO. DAMAGE INCLUDES DEBRIS DROPPED ON I-10, DAMAGE TO WINDOWS AND SIGN OF A WAFFLE HOUSE, THE COLLAPSE OF A CAR WASH BUILDING AND MINOR DAMAGE TO RESIDENTIAL ROOVES.
BUILDING DAMGE REPORTED BY LAFAYETTE SKYWARN SPOTTER NETWORK IN RAYNE. POSSIBLE TORNADO.

*** 1 FATAL, 12 INJ *** NWS STORM SURVEY CONFIRMS AN EF2 TORNADO TOUCHED DOWN. THE TORNADO WAS 300 YARDS WIDE AND PRODUCED A DAMAGE PATH 5 MILES LONG. EXTENSIVE DAMAGE NORTHWEST SECTION OF RAYNE WITH AT LEAST 35 HOMES DAMAGED ALONG WITH SEVERAL BUSINESSES AND THE HIGH SCHOOL. CITY OF RAYNE POLICE CONFIRM 12 INJURIES...1 FATALITY. FATALITY WAS 21 YEAR OLD FEMALE PROTECTING DAUGHTER DURING STORM WHEN TREE FELL THROUGH HOUSE.

*** 1 FATAL, 12 INJ *** LIKELY TORNADO. EXTENSIVE DAMAGE NORTHWEST SECTION OF RAYNE. CITY OF RAYNE POLICE CONFIRM 12 INJURIES...1 FATALITY. FATALITY WAS 21 YEAR OLD FEMALE PROTECTING DAUGHTER DURING STORM WHEN TREE FELL THROUGH HOUSE. NWS STORM SURVEY HAS NOT REACHED DAMAGE SITE. LIKELIHOOD OF TORNADO BASED ON MEDIA VIDEO AND NWS RADAR. UPDATED INTENSITY AND TRACK OF TORNADO WILL BE ISSUED WHEN SURVEY TEAM IS ABLE TO VIEW DAMAGE ON THE GROUND.
